name: swansong-playtester
description: Play and evaluate SwanSong Originals ROMs through SwanSong's deterministic MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Let Codex play real SwanSong ROMs and report reproducible failures.
interface.longDescription: Boots built WonderSwan Color cartridges through SwanSong's own deterministic engine and MCP server. Codex can inspect native screenshots, listen to the final audio window, apply exact-frame controls, replay plans deterministically, and produce evidence-backed playtest reports.
defaultPrompt: Play one SwanSong game and report whether its main loop works.
Run a smoke playtest across all ten games.
Reproduce this gameplay bug with screenshots and an input trace.
